Activation context favors 'up' direction but edges remain negative (-74.92 EUR/MWh up, -27.01 EUR/MWh down). Generator's marginal cost (85 EUR/MWh) sits above down price band. No simulator-accepted candidates available for 2 MWh probe.

Bid-seeking ablation requires positive edge for small probes, which is absent here.
